title: YTP - How Healthcare Reform Affects The Elderly
description:
Obama's new plan has coverage for Alzheimer's, Diabetes, even AIDS.

I tried to do a different style with this YTP, and it's definitely not my preferred kind. At any rate, I hope you find something of value contained within this footage. :3
